name: Metronidazole
description: I-Nitroimidazole antibiotic ene-anaerobic egqwesileyo kunye ne-protozoal coverage. Ibalulekile kumonzakalo wokugqobhoza esiswini/ezibilini ukugquma amathumbu e-anaerobic. Idla ngokusetyenziswa kunye ne-ciprofloxacin.
dose: 500 mg IV q6-8h. PO: 500 mg q8h (ukuba ngomlomo kunyamezelwe).
warnings: Ukusabela okufana ne-Disulfiram ngotywala-ungatyi utywala ngexesha lonyango kunye ne-48h emva koko.
Inokubangela i-peripheral neuropathy ngokusetyenziswa ixesha elide.

pediatric.dose: 7.5 mg / kg IV / PO q6h (max 500 mg / umthamo).
pediatric.note: Ikhuselekile kubantwana abadala. Ziphephe kwiintsana ezisanda kuzalwa.

obstetric.note: Gwema kwi-trimester yokuqala ukuba kunokwenzeka. Sebenzisa i-trimester yesibini/yesithathu xa kuyimfuneko ngokwezonyango--inzuzo ikholisa ukodlula umngcipheko wosulelo olunzulu lwe-anaerobic.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Abdominal Trauma
